updates.body: The platform-wide outage has cleared. Any remaining component issues are tracked individually.
Automated monitoring detected that multiple services are affected (Application API, Authentication & SSO, Social Feed, HR & Organization, Notifications & Email, Database). Our team has been alerted.
Database has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.
Automated monitoring detected that Database is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.
Notifications & Email has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.
Automated monitoring detected that Notifications & Email is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.
HR & Organization has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.
Automated monitoring detected that HR & Organization is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.
Social Feed has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.
Automated monitoring detected that Social Feed is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.
Authentication & SSO has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.
Automated monitoring detected that Authentication & SSO is responding slowly or partially. Our team has been alerted.
Application API has recovered and is fully operational again. Automated monitoring confirms healthy responses.
Automated monitoring detected that Application API is unreachable / failing health checks. Our team has been alerted.
